name: Lindy's Famous Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine flour, sugar, lemon peel, and vanilla. Make a well in the center.
2. Add egg yolk and butter. Mix with fingertips until the dough cleans the side of the bowl.
3. Form the dough into a ball and wrap it in waxed paper. Refrigerate for one hour.
4. Preheat the oven to 400°F. Grease the bottom and sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
5. Remove the side from the pan. Roll one-third of the dough on the bottom of the springform pan and trim the edge.
6. Bake for 8-10 minutes, or until golden. Let cool in the pan.
7. Meanwhile, divide the remaining dough into three parts. Roll each part into a 2 1/2-inch strip, 10 inches long.
8. Place the springform pan on top of the baked crust, with the dough strips lining the sides inside completely. Trim the dough so it comes only three-quarters up the side of the pan.
9. Refrigerate until ready to fill.
10. Preheat the oven to 500°F. Make the Filling: In a large bowl of electric mixer, combine cream cheese, sugar, flour, lemon and orange peel, and vanilla. Beat at high speed just to blend.
11. Add eggs and egg yolks one at a time. Then add heavy cream, beating until well combined.
12. Pour the mixture into the springform pan. Bake for 10 minutes.
13. Reduce the temperature to 250°F and bake for an additional hour.
14. Let the cheesecake cool in a wire rack. Glaze the top with strawberries.
15. Refrigerate for at least three hours or overnight.
16. To serve, loosen the pastry from the side of the pan with a spatula.
17. Remove the side of the springform pan and cut into wedges.
